title: glandularia teucriifolia
intro: Glandularia teucriifolia, also known as the butterfly flower, is a flowering plant native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful for treating wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Glandularia teucriifolia include its ability to reduce inflammation, fight off infections, and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
